arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Liverpool betting offer: Back Liverpool to win at 50/1 odds with Paddy Power
arts.sum: Paddy Power is offering new customers the chance to back Arne Slot's side to get revenge on Nottingham Forest at the City Ground in the Premier League at huge 50/1 odds

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp makes Man Utd point about Trent Alexander-Arnold with Liverpool contract message
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold was the subject of recent scrutiny but former Liverpool manager Jurgen Klopp has defended him once again amid transfer interest from Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Liverpool's reason for backing away from Martin Zubimendi transfer as Arsenal close on deal
arts.sum: Liverpool were very interested in a deal for Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi in the summer only for him to turn down a move but Arsenal could now finally bring him to the Premier League

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp promises to throw a PARTY for all his former Liverpool players if Man City are found guilty of financial breaches and stripped of their Premier League titles
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING IN SALZBURG: Jurgen Klopp has promised to throw a garden party for all his former Liverpool colleagues if Manchester City's titles are taken away from them.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp hopes Salah, Van Dijk and Alexander-Arnold sign new Liverpool deals
arts.sum: Forward Salah and defenders Van Dijk and Alexander-Arnold are all currently on contracts that will run out this summer.

arts.ttl: Report: Marinakis in fresh talks over Nottingham Forest stadium development plans after twist
Klopp reveals Virgil van Dijk could move to MLS
arts.sum: During the press conference, Klopp outlined his vision for overseeing Red Bull’s football operations while clarifying that he will not be managing any of the group’s teams. Jürgen Klopp was introduced as Red Bull’s new Head of Global Soccer on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Man City full list of FFP charges amid points deduction update as Liverpool watch on
arts.sum: Liverpool's Premier League rivals Manchester City are awaiting to discover the outcome of their hearing into 115 alleged breaches of the league's financial rules

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk Named His Favourite Footballer of All Time
arts.sum: The Dutchman, a one-time Premier League winner, named a former Barcelona star as his favourite footballer of all time.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Real Madrid, Bayern…Nottingham Forest: the shock feat eight clubs have in common
arts.sum: When the 2024/25 Premier League season started in August last year, few would have foreseen a January game between Nottingham Forest and Liverpool being billed as a top-of-the-table clash . The year after being promoted from the English third tier under legendary manager Brian Clough in 1977, Nottingham Forest won their first ever English Division One title (the name for the top league at the time), making them the most recent promoted team to achieve that feat in England.
